wiki.summary: The song SexOnTheBeat was released by ADÉLA on August 22, 2025. In a statement made to VOGUE, ADÉLA discussed the meaning behind the track, noting that it addresses the perceived manipulation of female sexuality in popular culture. The artist explained that the use of sexuality as a marketing tool was a primary focus of the song. While acknowledging her personal perspective as a "sexual and liberal person" who is not bothered by this theme, ADÉLA also recognized that the topic "can be problematic for some." Read more on Last.fm.
